div.div:
Defintion : Raw and unproccessed data as-is from sources
------------------
Objectives : tracability and debugging
---------------------
Object Type : Tables
------------------
Load Method : Full Load
------------------
Data Transformation :None
-------------
Data Modeling : None
----------------
Target Audience : Data Engineers

div.span:
Defintion : Clean And Standard Data
------------------
Objectives : Prepare Data For analysis
---------------------
Object Type : Tables
------------------
Load Method : Full Load
------------------
Data Transformation :Data cleaning + data normalization + data enrichment + derived columns
-------------
Data Modeling : None
----------------
Target Audience : Data Engineer
